title: Registry Degraded Lifecycle Entry
description: Schema for tracking DEGRADED reconciler findings over time. Prevents noise decay by enforcing review_date, owner, escalation policy, and resolution tracking. Prototype artifact — not a public release contract.

degraded_id.description: Unique identifier for this degraded finding lifecycle record.

object_id.description: RegistryObject ID that produced the degraded finding.

invariant.description: Reconciler invariant that triggered this finding.

status.description: Current lifecycle status of this degraded finding.

owner.description: Accountable party for resolving this degraded finding.

first_seen.description: ISO date when this finding was first detected.

review_date.description: Next review date. Escalation policy triggers if unresolved beyond this date.

severity.description: Severity classification of this degraded finding.

escalation_policy.description: What happens if unresolved beyond review_date.

resolution_status.description: Whether and how this finding has been resolved.
